nodes.label: components
nodes.summary: This project focuses on the **Agent Creation** process, providing a user-friendly interface to build and customize AI assistants. It utilizes a *Wizard component* to guide users through a sequence of specific steps—such as selecting a **Model**, defining a **Prompt**, and enabling various **Tools**—to ensure a complete and structured agent setup.

children.label: agents/new-agent-creation/CreateAgentWizard.tsx
children.summary: Reconstructed source code for the CreateAgentWizard React component, which configures the WizardProvider with a sequence of steps (Location, Method, Generate, Type, Prompt, Description, Tools, Model, Color, Memory) for creating a new agent.
